name: Dark Scorpion Combination
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>必</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>殺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>！<ruby lang="jp"><rb>黒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>蠍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さそり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>コンビネーション
desc: You can only activate this card when there are "Don Zaloog", "Dark Scorpion - Cliff the Trap Remover", "Dark Scorpion - Chick the Yellow", "Dark Scorpion - Gorg the Strong", and "Dark Scorpion - Meanae the Thorn" face-up on your side of the field. During this turn, any of these 5 cards can attack your opponent's Life Points directly. In that case, the Battle Damage inflicted to your opponent by each of those cards becomes 400 points.
eff: You can only activate this card when there are "Don Zaloog", "Dark Scorpion - Cliff the Trap Remover", "Dark Scorpion - Chick the Yellow", "Dark Scorpion - Gorg the Strong", and "Dark Scorpion - Meanae the Thorn" face-up on your side of the field. During this turn, any of these 5 cards can attack your opponent's Life Points directly. In that case, the Battle Damage inflicted to your opponent by each of those cards becomes 400 points.

jp_sets.set: Threat of the Dark Demon World

mentions: Dark Scorpion - Cliff the Trap Remover
